Class ProjectileModel

  • ProjectileModel
  • Defined in projectile-model.ts:30

Constructors

constructor

Constructors

constructor

  • new ProjectileModel(): ProjectileModel

  • Returns ProjectileModel

Methods

advance

  • advance(deltaTime: number): void

  • Desc

    Advances the simulation by a given time step (deltaTime), updating the elapsed time and computing the new position of the projectile. If the projectile has landed (i.e., its y coordinate is less than or equal to 0), it marks it as landed and computes the final landing position. Otherwise, it adds the current position to the trajectory array for later rendering.

    Parameters

    • deltaTime: number

    Returns void

    • Defined in projectile-model.ts:54

computeFlightTime

  • computeFlightTime(): number

  • Desc

    Computes the total flight time of the projectile using the kinematic equations of motion, taking into account the initial velocity, launch angle, initial height, and gravitational acceleration. It solves for the time when the projectile lands (y coordinate becomes 0) and returns that time as the flight time.

    Returns

    the total flight time of the projectile in seconds

    Returns number

    • Defined in projectile-model.ts:93

computeMaxHeight

  • computeMaxHeight(): number

  • Desc

    Computes the maximum height reached by the projectile using the kinematic equations of motion. It calculates the vertical velocity at launch and uses it to determine how high the projectile will go before it starts descending, taking into account the initial height and gravitational acceleration.

    Returns

    the maximum height reached by the projectile in meters

    Returns number

    • Defined in projectile-model.ts:103

computeRange

  • computeRange(): number

  • Desc

    Computes the horizontal range of the projectile, which is the total horizontal distance traveled from launch to landing. It uses the initial velocity, launch angle, and flight time to calculate how far the projectile will go horizontally before it lands.

    Returns

    the horizontal range of the projectile in meters

    Returns number

    • Defined in projectile-model.ts:112

currentPosition

  • currentPosition(): {
        coordX: number;
        coordY: number;
    }

  • Desc

    Returns the current position of the projectile as an object with coordX and coordY properties. The y coordinate is clamped to a minimum of 0 to represent the ground level.

    Returns

    an object containing the current x and y coordinates of the projectile in mathematical terms (not pixel coordinates)

    Returns {
        coordX: number;
        coordY: number;
    }

    • coordX: number
    • coordY: number
    • Defined in projectile-model.ts:72

getParameters

  • getParameters(): LaunchParameters

  • Desc

    Getter for the current launch parameters, returns a copy of the parameters object to prevent external mutation of the internal state.

    Returns

    a copy of the current launch parameters (initial height, initial velocity, launch angle in degrees)

    Returns LaunchParameters

    • Defined in projectile-model.ts:132

getSummary

  • getSummary(): LaunchSummary

  • Desc

    Returns a summary of the projectile launch, including flight time, horizontal range, and maximum height. This method is typically called after the projectile has landed to provide a concise summary of the launch results.

    Returns

    an object containing the flight time, horizontal range, and maximum height of the projectile launch

    Returns LaunchSummary

    • Defined in projectile-model.ts:120

getTrajectory

  • getTrajectory(): {
        coordX: number;
        coordY: number;
    }[]

  • Desc

    Returns the trajectory of the projectile as an array of points, where each point is an object with coordX and coordY properties representing the position of the projectile at a given time step.

    Returns

    [] an array of objects representing the trajectory of the projectile, with each object containing the x and y coordinates in mathematical terms

    Returns {
        coordX: number;
        coordY: number;
    }[]

    • Defined in projectile-model.ts:87

isLanded

  • isLanded(): boolean

  • Desc

    Returns true if the projectile has landed (i.e., its y coordinate is at or below ground level), otherwise returns false.

    Returns

    true if the projectile has landed, false otherwise

    Returns boolean

    • Defined in projectile-model.ts:81

setParameters

  • setParameters(params: LaunchParameters): void

  • Desc

    Sets the parameters for the projectile launch and resets the state of the model to prepare for a new simulation.

    Parameters

    • params: LaunchParameters

    Returns void

    • Defined in projectile-model.ts:41
